evidence_summary: As of April 2026, Axsome Therapeutics and Takeda Pharmaceutical Company have entered into an asset purchase agreement, not a corporate acquisition or merger. Axsome acquired the exclusive global rights to the drug candidate balipodect (TAK-063) from Takeda. Under the terms of the deal, Takeda received an upfront payment and remains eligible for future milestone payments and royalties. This is a product-level licensing/asset acquisition rather than a company-level acquisition, merger, or subsidiary relationship.
